notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Spencer Torkelson out at 2nd. Zach McKinstry out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.
